product: L-Acoustics 115XT HiQ (coaxial stage monitor, XT/P series — discontinued/legacy)

electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 139.5 dB peak with the MONITOR preset (half-space loading); 136.5 dB with the FILL preset (free field). Measured at 1 m with 10 dB crest-factor pink noise.
electroacoustic.components: Coaxial 2-way: 1x 15" weather-resistant LF transducer in a bass-reflex tuned enclosure (8 Ω, 450 W RMS LF), coaxially loaded with a 1x 3" diaphragm compression driver on a conical waveguide (8 Ω, 125 W RMS HF). Active 2-way filtering.

operating_modes: HIGH-PASS (100 Hz high-pass, for use with subwoofers)
amplification.preset_note: FULL RANGE presets: HIQ_FR (FRONT/FOH standalone), HIQ_FI (FILL/free field), HIQ_MO (MONITOR/half-space). HIGH-PASS variants add a 100 Hz high-pass for subwoofer pairing: HIQ_FR_100, HIQ_FI_100, HIQ_MO_100. Loaded via the LA-controller front panel or LA Network Manager.

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), wired in parallel for loop-through/parallel connection of a second enclosure
connection.recommended_cables: SP.7 / SP10 / SP25 for LA4/LA4X; DOFILL-LA8 (extended with DO.7 / DO10 / DO25) for LA8

physical.cabinet: 18, 24 and 30 mm Baltic birch plywood, wedge-shaped, RAL 8019 Grey Brown finish
physical.front: Polyester-coated steel grill with acoustically transparent Airnet fabric

modes: Floor wedge monitor (two fixed wedge angles: 30° and 60° from vertical)
Wall or ceiling mount (ETR15 accessory, 0-360° in 10° steps)
deployment.inter_element_angles: XTLIFTBAR: azimuth in 10° steps, site at -14°/-7°/0°/+7°/+14°
deployment.rigging_note: Refer to the XT and P rigging procedures manual for XT-range-specific procedures.

usage: Compact coaxial enclosure that doubles as a wedge-shaped floor stage monitor and a short/long-throw fill or FOH point source, with the coaxial 15"/3" arrangement giving a smooth 50° axi-symmetric pattern and strong feedback rejection.
Each enclosure needs 2 amp channels (one LF, one HF). On an LA4/LA4X drive up to 2 cabinets per amp (channels 1 and 3); on an LA8 drive up to 4 cabinets, parallelling a second box per channel pair.
For monitor use load the MONITOR preset (half-space EQ, highest output at 139.5 dB peak); for free-field distributed fills use the FILL preset, and for standalone FOH use the FRONT preset.
When paired with subwoofers, switch to a HIGH-PASS preset (e.g. HIQ_FR_100) so the cabinet rolls off at 100 Hz and hands LF duty to the subs.
Mounts flexibly: pole-mount via the 35 mm socket, wall/ceiling via ETR15, fly via XTLIFTBAR, or floor-stack at the built-in 30°/60° wedge angles; add the M8 eyebolt for safety when flown.

Legacy/discontinued product — superseded in the current catalog; verify firmware preset library version (1.3 to 2.0 optimized the MONITOR presets) and confirm spare-part availability before specifying for new installs.
source_manual: 115XT HiQ Coaxial Stage Monitor User Manual (EN), version 1.4
